description_long: This is a mid-century modern wooden coffee table with a rectangular top and four tapered legs. The table features two slatted front drawers on either side and an open central compartment, providing both storage and display space. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a warm, natural appearance. The sides and back are plain, with no additional features or openings. The finish appears smooth and matte, enhancing the natural wood look. This table is well-suited for living rooms, lounges, or waiting areas in urban environments.
description: A mid-century modern wooden coffee table with two slatted drawers, an open central compartment, and four tapered legs. The table has a smooth, matte wood finish and visible grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing two slatted drawers and an open central compartment.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, solid wood side panel and the tapered leg profile.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain back panel and no visible compartments or drawers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid wood side and leg.
